title: hunger Reworked Reforged
body:
Consumed food will first fill a stomach bar that will over time be digested to fill your normal food bar.

This means that eating food won't immediately fill up your food bar, and foods like golden apples that have an effect will only give you an effect after the food has been fully digested.

Eating too much food can get you under the influence

This mod was reset according to the Hunger Reworked mod, I reset it to fit my modpacks

Compare the original mod：

 
New features:
Aid digestion effect and corresponding potion
Added digestive aid effect, as well as the corresponding digestive medicine, strong digestive medicine, long - term digestive medicine. No compositing table added, you can add it with kubejs. Recommended integration pack makers to make their own custom potions.

The following can be modified in the configuration file:
FAST_DIGEST_BASE_TICK_RATE
FAST_DIGEST_CONSUME_RATE
The former means how many times the Tick effect takes effect, while the latter means how many times the effect takes effect.

New item Tag:
hunger_reworked_reforged:ignore_stomach
The Tag contains foods that will not fill the player, but will restore the original effect.

Modification and repair:
The cake no longer adds fullness
Vomiting no longer causes the Diet to lose all its nutritional value

Bug fix:
Eating the cake gives an extra note
Eat cake reset cake square twice
